targets.query:
from(bucket: "bas")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "point_update")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["device_id"] == "${device_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["point_name"] == "${point_name}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "bas")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "point_update")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["device_id"] == "${device_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["point_name"] == "${point_name}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> keep(columns: ["device_id", "_value", "_time"])
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r.device_id}))

from(bucket: "bas")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "point_update")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["device_id"] == "${device_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["point_name"] == "${point_name}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> keep(columns: ["unit", "_value", "_time"])
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r.unit}))

from(bucket: "bas")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "point_update")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["device_id"] == "${device_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["point_name"] == "${point_name}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "bas")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "point_update")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["device_id"] == "${device_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["point_name"] == "${point_name}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "point_name", "device_id", "unit"])

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(
  bucket: "bas",
  tag: "device_id",
  predicate: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "point_update"
)
list.name: device_id
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(
  bucket: "bas",
  tag: "device_id",
  predicate: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "point_update"
)
list.label: Device

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(
  bucket: "bas",
  tag: "point_name",
  predicate: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "point_update" and r["device_id"] == "${device_id}"
)
list.name: point_name
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(
  bucket: "bas",
  tag: "point_name",
  predicate: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "point_update" and r["device_id"] == "${device_id}"
)
list.label: Point
list.description: Select a point on the device
